faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: YaVoy connects neighbors who need transportation with drivers already making the same trip. You search for a ride, contact via WhatsApp, and agree on the details.
faq.a2: Yes, YaVoy is completely free. Travel costs (gas, tolls) are agreed directly between you.
faq.q3: How do I contact a driver?
faq.a3: Each ride has a contact button that opens WhatsApp directly with the driver.
faq.a4: YaVoy is designed for rural communities where people know each other. Plus, you can see ratings from other users.
faq.q5: How do I publish a ride?
faq.a5: Sign in with your account, go to 'Publish ride' and fill in the details: origin, destination, date, time, and available seats.
